options.name: Laser Power
options.description: Manual laser power in mw. applicable only when laser power mode is set to Manual

options.name: Emitter Enabled
options.description: Emitter select, 0-disable all emitters, 1-enable laser, 2-enable laser auto (opt), 3-enable LED (opt)

options.name: Frames Queue Size
options.description: Max number of frames you can hold at a given time. Increasing this number will reduce frame drops but increase latency, and vice versa

options.name: Error Polling Enabled
options.description: Enable / disable polling of camera internal errors

options.name: Output Trigger Enabled
options.description: Generate trigger from the camera to external device once per frame

options.name: Depth Units
options.description: Number of meters represented by a single depth unit

options.name: Stereo Baseline
options.description: Distance in mm between the stereo imagers

options.name: Inter Cam Sync Mode
options.description: Inter-camera synchronization mode: 0:Default, 1:Master, 2:Slave, 3:Full Salve, 4-258:Genlock with burst count of 1-255 frames for each trigger, 259 and 260 for two frames per trigger with laser ON-OFF and OFF-ON.

options.name: Emitter On Off
options.description: Alternating emitter pattern, toggled on/off on per-frame basis

options.name: Auto Exposure Limit
options.description: Exposure limit is in microseconds. If the requested exposure limit is greater than frame time, it will be set to frame time at runtime. Setting will not take effect until next streaming session.

options.name: Auto Gain Limit
options.description: Gain limits ranges from 16 to 248. If the requested gain limit is less than 16, it will be set to 16. If the requested gain limit is greater than 248, it will be set to 248. Setting will not take effect until next streaming session.

options.name: Exposure
options.description: Controls exposure time of color camera. Setting any value will disable auto exposure

options.name: White Balance
options.description: Controls white balance of color image. Setting any value will disable auto white balance

options.name: Frames Queue Size
options.description: Max number of frames you can hold at a given time. Increasing this number will reduce frame drops but increase latency, and vice versa

options.name: Auto Exposure Priority
options.description: Restrict Auto-Exposure to enforce constant FPS rate. Turn ON to remove the restrictions (may result in FPS drop)
